roles.firmaDesc: For companies looking for integrators. Post listings, receive proposals.
roles.entegratorDesc: For service integrators. Submit proposals to projects.

index.subtitle: Turkey's most comprehensive B2B platform connecting companies and integrators. Find the right business partner, bring your projects to life.
index.forCompaniesDesc: Find integrators for your project, receive and compare proposals.
index.forIntegratorsDesc: Access new projects, submit your proposals and grow your business.
index.secureCommunicationDesc: Access contact information with the credit system, negotiate safely.
index.messagingDesc: Easily manage your communication with in-platform messaging.
index.joinPlatformDesc: Take your place among thousands of companies and integrators. Register for free, don't miss the opportunities.
index.guestModeDesc: Which role would you like to view? In guest mode, you can only view existing features.
index.guestModeNote: You cannot make changes in guest mode. Sign up for full access.
index.paymentNote: You will be contacted for payment processing.

credits.title: Buy Credits
credits.kobiPackageDesc: Ideal starter package for small and medium-sized businesses.
credits.bigPackageDesc: For large-scale companies. Multiple projects and intensive integrator search.
credits.globalPackageDesc: For corporate companies. Maximum flexibility and best value.
